segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: Do you have anything to declare?

segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: Any food, alcohol, tobacco, or medication?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: No alcohol or tobacco. I have a few sealed snacks and some personal medication.

segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: Any fresh food, meat, or fruit?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: No fresh food, no meat, and no fruit. Just packaged snacks.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, it's for personal use, and it's still in the original packaging.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I'll be here for my PhD program, about four to five years.

segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: All right. You can go ahead.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thank you. Have a good night.
